case_title: LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL VS. YANG LIAO et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIAO, YANG LIU, BEIMING $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00, THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT VACATES AND SUPERSEDES THE JUDGMENT FILED DECEMBER 6, 2022. UPON REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT THE JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT'S ANSWER, THE COURT NOW REALIZE THAT THE JUDGMENT HAS BASED ON AN ERRONEOUS FACTUAL PREMISE. EXPLANATION: DEFENDANTS KNEW ABOUT AND ACQUIESCED TO THE 60 DAY NOTICE REQUIREMENT AROUND THE TIME THEY ENROLLED THEIR CHILD. THE LATE FEES ARE NOT SUPPORTED BY THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-12-2023 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
ORDER DEFENDANTS WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) **PROOF OF SERVICE IS FOR OCT-27-22**;PER OCT-27-22 HEARING, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE PROOF BEFORE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANTS YANG LIAO AND BEIMING LIU WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE IN COURT; SERVED SEP-21-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, BEIMING
SC-108 ANSWER TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, BEIMING

RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JERRY CHOU, GENERAL MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2022 BY HAROLD E. KAHN. PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL, REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA WANG, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS YANG LIAO AND BEIMING LIU ARE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAIVED PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE LAST TRIAL/HEARING DATE ON 10-27-22. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 12-2-22)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL AS TO DEFENDANT LIAO, YANG LIU, BEIMING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, BEIMING MAILED TO PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-12-2023 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 611

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT LIAO, YANG LIU, BEIMING SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2022 - CONTINUED TO DEC-02-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 DEFENDANTS YANG LIAO AND BEIMING LIU WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JERRY CHOU, GENERAL MANAGER, AND CYNTHIA WANG, OWNER. DEFENDANT YANG LIAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEIMING LIU IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF STATED DEFENDANTS HAVE BEEN SERVED BUT PROOF OF SERVICE HAVE NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE CLERK OFFICE BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. DEFENDANTS YANG LIAO AND BEIMING LIU WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLE SEA TURTLES MANDARIN IMMERSION PRESCHOOL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIAO, YANG LIU, BEIMING PARENT HANDBOOK INITIALED BY DEFENDANTS CONTROLLS OVER FAQ. PARENT HANDBOOK REQUIRED NOTICE OF 30 DAYS, NOT 60 DAYS. THUS NO TUITION OWED FOR MARCH. WHILE DEFENDANTS ENTITLED TO A REFUND, THEY DID NOT FILE A CLAIM OF THEIR OWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
